description:
Travel times estimations of the road network of wider urban area of Thessaloniki (Greece) produced using Floating Car Data (FCD). Includes real-time as well as historical data.

Εκτιμήσεις χρόνων ταξιδίου οχημάτων στο οδικό δίκτυο της ευρύτερης αστικής περιοχής της Θεσσαλονίκης (Ελλάδα) χρησιμοποιώντας δεδομένα από οχήματα εν κινήσει (FCD). Περιλαμβάνονται δεδομένα πραγματικού χρόνου, καθώς και ιστορικά δεδομένα.
name: nap-rdf-travel-times-of-the-road-network-of-thessaloniki

resources.description:
A new dataset is added at the end of each month. The covered time period starts on the 1st of January 2017.

Additional information: 7zipped tab-delimited text file.

Available fields include: "Path_id", "Timestamp", and "Duration" (in seconds).
resources.name: travel-times-historical-txt
resources.title: Travel Times (Historical / TXT)

resources.description:
An HTTP call to this resource returns only the first 500 available records, since paging is performed with a default setting of 500 records.

To get the next 500 records, please append the following string in your GET request: ?offset=500&limit=500

For the next 500 records, append accordingly: ?offset=1000&limit=500

Similarly, for more records.

Available fields include: "Path_id", "Timestamp", and "Duration" (in seconds).
resources.name: travel-times-real-time-json
resources.title: Travel Times (Real-time / JSON)
